addRole(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Add a role to an existing edge.

computeEdgeId(address,address,bytes32).notice: Canonical edge ID = keccak256(subject, object, relationshipType)         One edge per triple. Roles are a set on the edge.

createEdge(address,address,bytes32,bytes.notice: Create a relationship edge. Optionally include initial roles.

getEdgeByTriple(address,address,bytes32).notice: Get the single edge for a subject-object-relationshipType triple.

removeRole(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Remove a role from an edge.
